title: Stabbed
description: A simple texture pack that replaces swords with knives as it dosen't clutter the screen as much.
body:
A simple texture pack that replaces swords with knives as it dosen't clutter the screen as much.

Changes: 

All swords have their unique knives texture
They each have been renamed from "Sword" to "Knife"

Disclaimer: I will not be updating this pack expect if Mojang adds a new type of sword
